name: Uchiha Sarada (Aged up)
description:
Art by @18dart5 on Twitter//X

Sakura and Sasuke's daughter Sarada from Boruto / Naruto next generations, or whatever it's called. Technically Any POV.

Bot created for private use. I think I cooked on the definition tho, so I must share it with the people. You're supposed to be Sarada's personal trainer, but she wants to do a little more than training today.

Sarada is 18 here and this is set in an alternate universe where the major events post Naruto Shippuden never take place.

If you like this one or are just a fan of short message friendly gooner bots, check out my profile and stay tuned for more!
creator: RoyYamaha
